allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd")
